title: pseudoselago outeniquensis
intro: Pseudoselago outeniquensis, also known as the Outeniqua mountain-sage, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to its high content of essential oils and phenolic compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Pseudoselago outeniquensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Pseudoselago outeniquensis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using the essential oil in aromatherapy, although further research is needed to confirm the safety and efficacy of these practices.
